summary: Página web atractiva para COBAD 35 (escuela) con formulario de inscripción, sistema de dudas con contacto directo a WhatsApp e Instagram, e información sobre beneficios de estudiar en la institución
architectural_notes: Página web estática con formularios del lado del cliente
Integración directa con WhatsApp usando protocolo de enlace (wa.me)
Enlace directo a Instagram (@omar_garcia_18) para contacto
Integración con Google Maps para mostrar ubicación de la escuela

existing_features.title: Create a hero section with the school name 'COBAD 35', a compelling tagline about quality education, and a prominent call-to-action button for enrollment
Create an 'About COBAD 35' section highlighting the benefits and advantages of studying at COBAD 35, including academic excellence, facilities, extracurricular activities, and student success stories
Create an enrollment application form with fields for full name, email, phone number, date of birth, previous school, and grade level applying for, with form validation and submission to the backend
Create a questions/doubts form with fields for name, email, phone number, and question text, with form validation and submission to the backend
Add direct contact buttons for WhatsApp (+52 8313031210) and Instagram (@omar_garcia_18) that open the respective apps or web interfaces
Implement a clean, modern design system with warm, educational colors (avoid blue and purple), consistent typography, and professional spacing throughout all sections
Render all generated images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated and display them appropriately throughout the website
Change the questions/doubts form section colors to burgundy (guindo) and white color scheme, applying burgundy as the primary accent color and white as the background/text color

Display a prominent success message reading 'No se van a arrepentir de estudiar en el COBAD 35 de Gómez Farías' (You won't regret studying at COBAD 35 de Gómez Farías) in large title text when users submit their questions/doubts through the form

Change the entire website color scheme to burgundy (guindo) and white, applying burgundy as the primary accent color across all sections including hero section, about section, enrollment form, footer, and any other page elements. Update all CSS variables and Tailwind configurations to use burgundy and white consistently throughout the application.

Add an interactive map section displaying the location of COBAD 35 de Gómez Farías using the Google Maps embed with the URL https://maps.app.goo.gl/7vmjBD4RjaFTk1gY8. The map should be embedded as an iframe and positioned prominently on the page so visitors can easily see where the school is located.

Add a credit line at the end of the page (in the Footer component) stating that the website was made by a student from COBAD 35 named Omar García Arias. The text should read: 'Página creada por Omar García Arias, alumno del COBAD 35' or similar. Style it consistently with the existing footer design using the burgundy and white color scheme.

new_feature_requests.summary: Diseño web atractivo con imágenes y colores institucionales
Sistema de dudas con contacto a WhatsApp (+52 8313031210) e Instagram (@omar_garcia_18)
Secciones informativas sobre COBAD 35 y beneficios de estudiar ahí
Create a backend data model to store enrollment applications with fields for student name, email, phone number, date of birth, previous school, grade level applying for, and submission timestamp
Create a backend data model to store student questions/doubts with fields for name, email, phone number, question text, and submission timestamp
Cambiar colores de la página principal a guindo (burgundy) y blanco
Mostrar mensaje motivacional sobre no arrepentirse de estudiar en COBAD 35 de Gómez Farías cuando se envíe el formulario de dudas
Cambiar toda la página a colores guindo (burgundy) y blanco
Agregar mapa interactivo mostrando la ubicación de COBAD 35 de Gómez Farías usando Google Maps (https://maps.app.goo.gl/7vmjBD4RjaFTk1gY8)
Agregar al final de la página un crédito indicando que fue hecha por un alumno del COBAD 35 llamado Omar García Arias
